name: local-openclaw
title: Local OpenClaw Install Profile
description: JarvOS profile for onboarding a local OpenClaw runtime without making OpenClaw the portable foundation.

boundary.principle: OpenClaw is the local runtime adapter; JarvOS remains Markdown-first, tracker-agnostic, and assistant-portable.
boundary.taskAuthority: Paperclip remains the live project/status system. OpenClaw sessions execute work, but do not own canonical issue status.

skills.name: openclaw-runtime-adapter
skills.role: Register a local OpenClaw runtime as an adapter around JarvOS contracts.
guardrails: Keep OpenClaw-specific behavior behind adapter registration instead of hard-coding it into core JarvOS packages.
Do not overwrite an existing OpenClaw runtime config during onboarding.

skills.name: openclaw-guidelines
skills.role: Expose OpenClaw operational guidelines as an installed runtime skill.
guardrails: Use guidelines to improve runtime behavior while keeping reusable JarvOS principles portable.

skills.name: workflow-execution
skills.role: Route meaningful work through plan, tracker intake, execution, and verification.
guardrails: Paperclip is the default live tracker; markdown project boards are reference artifacts unless explicitly in compatibility mode.

skills.name: context-management
skills.role: Install context-budget, compaction, and continuity guidance for long-running local sessions.
guardrails: Treat runtime compaction as an adapter concern; durable memory contracts stay in JarvOS packages.

skills.name: lossless-claw-continuity-check
skills.role: Check whether lossless-claw is available for conversation continuity without requiring it for profile install.
guardrails: Use lossless-claw for conversation continuity only; do not treat it as the canonical note or task store.

commands.name: openclaw
commands.purpose: Run and inspect the local OpenClaw runtime.
commands.installHint: Install OpenClaw and ensure `openclaw --version` works on PATH.

commands.name: lossless-claw
commands.purpose: Optional conversation-continuity checks for local OpenClaw sessions.
commands.installHint: Optional: install lossless-claw as an OpenClaw extension, then run `jarvos-skills init --pack local-openclaw --enable-lossless-claw` to wire it as the context engine.

files.name: openclaw-state-dir
files.installHint: Run `jarvos-skills init --pack local-openclaw` to register the workspace without overwriting runtime config.

files.name: openclaw-runtime-config
files.purpose: Existing OpenClaw runtime configuration, if one has already been created.
files.installHint: If absent, let OpenClaw create its runtime config; JarvOS onboarding will not write this file.
